data.title: Burney Company's BRNY ETF gets 5-Star Morningstar Rating™ on Sep 30, 2025, marking its 3rd year anniversary.
data.description: In Reston, Virginia, on December 4, 2025, The Burney Company revealed that their Burney U.S. Factor Rotation ETF (BRNY) obtained a prestigious 5-Star Morningstar Rating™ as of September 30, 2025, marking its 3rd year in operation. This recognition signifies the ETF's exceptional performance and aligns with its successful track record.

data.title: Royalty Pharma and Denali Therapeutics agree on $275 million royalty funding deal based on tividenofusp alfa sales.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Royalty Pharma plc (Nasdaq: RPRX) and Denali Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DNLI) revealed a synthetic royalty funding contract worth $275 million. This agreement is tied to forthcoming net sales of tividenofusp alfa.
FORMER EU FOREIGN CHIEF MOGHERINI HAS RESIGNED AS RECTOR AMID FRAUD PROBE, SHE SAYS IN LETTER.

data.title: BSV Association joins Blockchain for Europe Summit 2025 in Brussels, showcasing blockchain innovation.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, in ZUG, Switzerland, the BSV Association (BSVA), a non-profit organization advocating for enterprise blockchain adoption, took part in the Blockchain for Europe Summit 2025 on December 2nd and 3rd at SPARKS in Brussels. The BSVA serves as a global advocate for blockchain technology and was actively involved in discussions and presentations at the summit.
ISRAELI MILITARY SPOKESPERSON ISSUES EVACUATION ORDER TO BUILDINGS IN TWO SOUTHERN LEBANESE TOWNS - POST ON X

data.title: Brighton Marine promotes Adam Hellman to COO, Stanley F. Lowe as CIO. Hellman continues as general counsel as well.
data.description: Brighton Marine in Boston has promoted Adam Hellman from general counsel to chief operating officer. In his new role, Hellman will oversee the operational aspects of the organization's healthcare, housing, and veteran-support programs while continuing to serve as general counsel. CEO Rosye B. Cloud praised Hellman for his strategic vision, legal expertise, and operations skills, highlighting his unique skill set. This move aims to drive innovation within Brighton Marine under Hellman's leadership.

data.title: TD Bank Group reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal 2025. Adjusted Q4 diluted EPS were $2.18, up from $1.72 last year, while adjusted net income rose to $3.9 billion. Full-year adjusted net income reached $15.03 billion, compared to $14.28 billion in the previous year. Quarterly restructuring charges amounted to $190 million. The Bank demonstrated progress and growth across various segments, including Canadian Personal and Commercial Banking, U.S. Retail, Wealth Management, Insurance, and Wholesale Banking.
data.description: TD Bank Group reported their financial results for the fourth quarter ended October 31, 2025. The reported earnings were $3.3 billion, a decrease of 10% compared to the same quarter the previous year, while adjusted earnings were $3.9 billion, up 22%. The reported diluted earnings per share were $1.82 compared to $1.97 the previous year. Adjusted diluted earnings per share were $2.18 compared to $1.72 the previous year. For the full year financial highlights, reported net income was $20,538 million compared to $8,842 million the previous year, and adjusted net income was $15,025 million compared to $14,277 million the previous year. The Bank outlined various adjustments for items of note impacting their financial results, including amortization of acquired intangibles, acquisition and integration charges, and restructuring charges. The Bank achieved record revenue and net income in various banking segments, with Canadian Personal and Commercial Banking delivering strong performance. The Bank's U.S. Retail segment reported net income of $719 million, up 31% year-over-year. Wealth Management and Insurance also contributed to growth, with record earnings in Wealth Management and lower losses in Insurance. The Bank's Wholesale Banking segment reported record revenue and net income. The Bank's Common Equity Tier 1 Capital ratio was reported at 14.7%. CEO Raymond Chun highlighted the Bank's performance and strategic focus on strengthening relationships, running a simpler and faster bank, and achieving disciplined execution. The Bank also provided future targets and discussed ongoing efforts in remediation of the Bank's U.S. BSA/AML program and Enterprise AML program. They provided detailed financial reconciliations and adjustments made to reported earnings, showcasing their usage of non-GAAP financial measures. The Bank plans to continue investing and innovating to support clients' needs and drive long-term value for shareholders.

data.title: Hope Medicine Inc.'s HMI-115 receives FDA Fast Track Designation after Phase II trial for endometriosis; 42% reduction in dysmenorrhea pain, 52% in pelvic pain.
data.description: HMI-115 has been granted FDA Fast Track Designation after showing promising results in a Phase II clinical trial for endometriosis. In the trial, the average dysmenorrhea pain score decreased by 42%, while the mean non-menstrual chronic pelvic pain score decreased by 52%. Additionally, a majority of patients reported the maintenance of normal menstrual cycles, with no signs of typical peri-menopausal symptoms.

data.title: PowerBank shares details on $168M construction value projects in NY, $65M investment tax credit for 7,500 homes equivalent.
data.description: A total of $65 million USD in Investment Tax Credit Eligibility Projects have been announced by PowerBank Corporation (NASDAQ: SUUN), aiming to power the equivalent of 7,500 homes. Community solar and energy storage projects will continue to be eligible for a 30% Investment Tax Credit, along with potential bonus adders. The announcement was made in Toronto on December 4, 2025.

data.title: USANA extends partnership with Jamaican Bobsled Team for two more Olympic cycles, supporting their Olympic dreams.
data.description: USANA Health Sciences, Inc., a prominent global nutrition company, has announced the extension of its partnership with the renowned Jamaica Bobsleigh and Skeleton Federation (JBSF). The partnership, which had been in place previously, will now continue for two additional Olympic cycles. This extension, effective as of December 4, 2025, signifies a continued commitment to supporting the JBSF in their athletic endeavors. This collaboration highlights the dedication of USANA Health Sciences, Inc. towards promoting and enhancing the performance of Jamaican athletes in winter sports, solidifying their support for the JBSF through the upcoming Olympic cycles.

data.title: Up to 50% off at Natural Grocers® Holly Deals Event, Dec 6-Dec 22, 2025. Festive family events, giveaways, and recipes.
data.description: Celebrate the holiday season in style with discounts of up to 50% on high-quality items, exciting family activities, special holiday contests, distinctive presents, and recipes that will enhance the festive ambiance. Located in LAKEWOOD, Colo., significant savings can be enjoyed from December 4, 2025. Embrace the enchantment of the season with dazzling lights, delicious treats, and warm gatherings.

data.title: Americans plan to spend $4,700 on New Year's resolutions, with 42% setting goals for 2026.
data.description: In Raleigh, N.C. as of December 4, 2025, a report highlighted that as 2026 nears, self-improvement has become a key focus for numerous Americans. With 42% of the population intending to establish New Year's resolutions for 2026, it is evident that they are prepared to make investments towards their personal development. On average, individuals anticipate spending around $4,700 in pursuit of accomplishing their set objectives.

data.title: TNL Mediagene launches "iGood Price-Drop Radar" in Taiwan, building on ¥200M crowdfunding success in Japan.
data.description: In mid-December, TNL Mediagene is set to introduce its inaugural in-house created LINE-based utility tool, the "iGood Price-Drop Radar." This innovative tool is specifically crafted to provide automated alerts for price drops on e-commerce platforms. By integrating with the company's thriving shopping and lifestyle services, this tool aims to enhance the user experience and provide real-time notifications on discounts and promotions.

data.title: Arnold Gold joins Way.com as EVP of Way Repair, leading AI vehicle solutions division, effective Dec 4, 2025.
data.description: In a move aimed at expanding into AI-powered vehicle repair and maintenance solutions, Way.com, a leading industry player headquartered in Fremont, California, revealed the appointment of Arnold Gold as the Executive Vice President of Way Repair on December 4, 2025. This strategic decision marks the company's venture into a new line of business, reflecting its commitment to innovation and growth in the automotive sector.

data.title: Dove and Crumbl are launching a limited-edition collection in Canada exclusively on National Cookie Day at Walmart.ca. Expansion to Walmart stores nationwide starts on Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: In Toronto, Dove and Crumbl have announced a highly anticipated collaboration being brought to Canada. The NEW limited-edition Dove x Crumbl collection is now available exclusively at Walmart.ca starting today, coinciding with National Cookie Day, due to significant demand. The collection will be released in Walmart stores across the country from January 14, 2026. This partnership introduces a range of personal care items inspired by the irr. Get your hands on these products to satiate your skin’s sweet tooth.

data.title: Upbound Group, Inc. declares $0.39 quarterly cash dividend for Q1 2026, payable on Jan 6 to stockholders.
data.description: In Plano, Texas, Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.39 for Q1 2026. This dividend, approved by the Board of Directors, will be disbursed on January 6, 2026, to common stockholders recorded at the close of business. Upbound is a prominent provider of financial solutions targeting underserved consumers, focusing on their changing needs.

data.title: Pet Valu's Companions for Change™ initiatives raised over $4.3 million by 2025, aiding various causes like emergency relief & animal shelters.
data.description: A charitable program is providing support for various causes, including emergency relief, significant capital projects, Dog Guides, and community animal shelters. The program aims to assist in addressing pressing needs by offering financial aid for emergency situations, funding important infrastructure developments, aiding in the training and placement of Dog Guides to help individuals with disabilities, and supporting local animal shelters in the community. This philanthropic initiative highlights its commitment to making a difference by contributing to these vital areas, with a focus on improving overall well-being and welfare.

data.title: Canopy Growth launches Claybourne Gassers vapes in Canada, featuring liquid diamonds to expand in high-growth vape segment.
data.description: In Smiths Falls, Ontario, Canopy Growth Corporation (TSX: WEED) (Nasdaq: CGC) has unveiled the nationwide release of Claybourne Gassers, a fresh range of All-in-One (AIO) vapes with liquid diamonds. This launch signifies Claybourne's initiation into Canada's vape sector, expanding its dominance in potent infused products. The Claybourne Gassers launch is a move by Canopy Growth to diversify its offerings and tap into the growing vape market.

data.title: ICE re-appointed by UK DESNZ to host UK Emissions Trading Scheme auctions through 2028. 2026 auction calendar published.
data.description: Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. (NYSE: ICE), a prominent global technology and data provider renowned for its highly liquid energy and environmental markets, has revealed that the UK Department for Energy Security & Net Zero (DESNZ) has selected ICE to oversee UK Allowance (UKA) auctions for the UK's Emissions Trading Scheme (ETS) until 2028. ICE has also released the 2026 UKA auction schedule, which can be accessed at www.ice.com/emissions/auctions/uk-emission-al.

data.title: Deep Fission to place small modular reactors in Kansas, groundbreaking on Dec 9, 2025 at Great Plains Industrial Park.
data.description: A company known as Deep Fission, specializing in advanced nuclear energy solutions, has chosen the Great Plains Industrial Park in Parsons, Kansas, as the location for its upcoming advanced reactor pilot project. The project involves placing small modular pressurized water reactors in boreholes dug one mile underground. To celebrate this development, Deep Fission will hold a groundbreaking ceremony on Tuesday, December 9, 2025. This marks a crucial step forward for the Company's initial endeavors in this innovative energy sector.
